segments.text: Make a joyful shout to the Lord, all you lands!
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Serve the Lord with gladness; Come before His presence with singing.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Know that the Lord, He is God; It is He who has made us, and not we ourselves; We are His people and the sheep of His pasture.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Enter into His gates with thanksgiving, And into His courts with praise. Be thankful to Him, and bless His name.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: For the Lord is good; His mercy is everlasting, And His truth endures to all generations.
segments.speaker: The LORD
